title: Opening for Production Engineer at Luminous Power Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Luminous Power Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Luminous Power Technologies in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Luminous Power Technologies:
Luminous Power Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies!
